info.english_meaning: to make a sound to shout

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AnardaM nardataH samyak tadA sUyaM Bavizyati' (BA0 u0 14147) Anardo mahAnAdaH Ramulantamiti nIlakaRWaH sUyam ityasya sTAne satyamiti kvacitpAWaH
'mahAmeGaM mahAGoraM darduraH prati nardati' (BA0 karRa0 3926) pratinardati prAtiBawyena nardati rOti
